title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot gain access.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite having sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is unresponsive.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city. They updated it but it still displays the old one.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile picture but gets an 'Upload failed' error.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their subscription but the toggle is disabled.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but didn't receive a confirmation email even though the payment succeeded.

title: Account Locked After Failed Attempts
description: Customer's account was locked after multiple failed login attempts and they are unable to unlock it via email.

title: Duplicate Charge on Statement
description: Customer noticed a duplicate charge on their bank statement for the same order placed on January 20th.

title: Dark Mode Not Saving Preference
description: Customer enables dark mode in settings but it reverts to light mode every time they reload the page.

title: Search Results Not Loading
description: Customer reports that searching for products returns a blank results page with no error message.

title: Notification Settings Not Working
description: Customer disabled email notifications in settings but continues to receive promotional emails.
